task_updates.executor_notes: Created `useShotGroups.ts` with a memoized `useShotGroups` hook, `ShotGroup` type, and deterministic 8-color `getShotColor`. The hook resolves clip generation IDs through `meta[clipId].asset -> registry.assets[assetKey].generationId`, skips missing links without throwing, pre-sorts row actions once, and emits only 2+ clip groups with increasing shot-image order and `gap < 0.5s`. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed the hook uses the required resolution chain `meta[action.id]?.asset -> registry.assets[assetKey]?.generationId` and silently excludes clips whenever any lookup in that chain is missing.
